title: Contract Triage Playbook
description: Structure for the legal team's playbook. Editor validation so a malformed rule is caught before it reaches the assistant.

id.description: Traceable rule id the assistant cites, e.g. NDA-TERM.

standard.description: Our default position on this clause.

acceptable_without_approval.description: Range a lawyer would accept without escalating.

fallback.description: How far we can move if pushed.

preapproved_redline.description: Pre-approved edit the assistant may propose.

counterparty_reply.description: Wording for the draft reply on this point.

escalate_if.description: When a lawyer must own the point. DRAFT conditions fire on the incoming document; PUSHBACK conditions fire only after the counterparty resists our redline.
